name: Foundation

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Foundation is complete and correct

scope: Build the shared tier resolution primitive (internal/tierfs) and the test environment (internal/testutil/Environment). These are the foundational pieces everything else depends on: tierfs provides three-tier file resolution used by ConfigRepository, PromptRepository, and ClassRepository; Environment provides the test infrastructure all subsequent steps use instead of manual path construction. Steps 1-2 from the migration path.

scope.description: Verify tierfs provides correct three-tier resolution and Environment replaces manual test setup
criteria: WriteBase creates files in base tier
Environment creates valid scaffolded temp dir

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 leaf children: tier-resolution-primitive (tierfs package with FS struct + Resolver interface, 2 tasks) and test-environment (Environment struct, NodeSpec builders, With* helpers, 3 tasks). Ordering: tierfs first since Environment depends on it. tierfs consolidates existing patterns from pipeline/fragments.go and config/config.go. Environment initially populates Root, State, and an internal tierfs.FS; repository fields are nil stubs until those packages exist in later steps.

Audited both child nodes: tierfs (Resolver interface, FS impl, three-tier resolution, 11 tests) and testutil (Environment struct, NodeSpec builders, With* fluent methods, 37 tests). All code compiles, passes vet, and is gofmt-clean. No gaps found.

audit.result_summary: Foundation delivered two packages: tierfs provides a Resolver interface and FS implementation for three-tier file resolution (base < custom < local), referenced by ADR-063, with 11 passing tests covering override semantics, ResolveAll aggregation, WriteBase, and error paths. testutil provides an Environment struct with NodeSpec builders (Leaf, Orchestrator) and four With* fluent methods (WithConfig, WithProject, WithPrompt, WithRule) that compose a complete .wolfcastle directory for domain tests, backed by 37 passing tests. Both packages are gofmt-clean, pass go vet, and have no open gaps.
